data.name: Angry Boy
data.detailed_description:
📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌




關於此遊戲


[story]
The protagonist who was suddenly summoned to this world during the self-defense mission became a warrior in name only because of some kind of incident.
Will he be able to defeat all the demons and go back to his original world?


[How to play the game]
1. Attack the monster approaching the warrior to stop it.
2. Defeat monsters to reduce the boss physical strength.
3. If monsters reach or are attacked to the location where the warrior is, HP will decrease, so be careful.

[Manipulating key]
moving : Direction Key
attack : Space bar
Burning Semen : Z Key


[Game Features]
It features three female characters.
If you lose to the boss, you get a weird illustration.
If you win over the boss, you get a weird illustration.

data.short_description: Win a battle with the demons and make them obey. If you lose, you'll be reduced to their toys.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Window7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
